intro_sub: Designing controlled AI infrastructures that integrate into enterprise systems without increasing structural risk.
repo_desc: Design of AI-enabled system templates with explicit input/output contracts, validation layers, and modular orchestration components.
repo_metric: Reduced architectural uncertainty during AI adoption.
flow_a_desc: Design of structured automation flows with validation checkpoints, error isolation, and controlled AI surface exposure.
flow_b_desc: Definition of prompt versioning strategies, failure handling models, and human-in-the-loop supervision frameworks.
